address: BIT Durg, GEC Campus, Sejbahar, Raipur Road, Durg, Chhattisgarh - 491001

landmarks.mainGate: Main entrance on Raipur Road. Security cabin at gate.
landmarks.adminBlock: First building after main gate. Houses Principal, HODs, Accounts, and Admin offices.
landmarks.academicBlock: Central building. All classrooms for CSE, IT, ECE, ME on respective floors.
landmarks.mbaBlock: Separate block to the left of main building. MBA and MCA departments.
landmarks.library: Ground floor, Academic Block. Enter from the left side entrance.
landmarks.canteen: Near main entrance, right side. Open 8 AM – 6 PM.
landmarks.auditorium: Behind the Academic Block. Capacity: 500 students.
landmarks.sportsGround: To the right of the campus. Cricket ground, basketball court.
landmarks.gym: Ground floor, Sports Block. Open 6 AM – 8 PM.
landmarks.hostelBlock: Boys hostel (Block A & B) at the back of campus. Girls hostel (Block C) separate entrance.
landmarks.medicalRoom: Room 005, Ground Floor, Admin Block. Open 9 AM – 5 PM.
